description.value: Aura moderate transmutation; CL 10th; Slot feet; Price 12,000 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION As a free action, the wearer of boots of speed can click her heels together, letting her act as though affected by a haste spell for up to 10 rounds each day. The haste effectâs duration need not be consecutive rounds. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, haste; Cost 6,000 gp.
